violations.description: General employee cleanliness. — --Food employee did not wash hands as necessary. Observed food employee put on gloves without washing her hands. Hands should be washed before putting on gloves.

Preventing contamination by employees. — --Employee's single-use gloves were not discarded after being damaged or soiled. Observed food employee touch her nose with gloves on and did not change her gloves before continuing food prep. Gloves should be changed when they are dirtied.

Cleaning frequency of equipment and utensils. — --Nonfood contact surface was not cleaned as frequently as required. Cabinets under the beverage bar were found dirty. These should be cleaned and maintained clean.
Mechanical cleaning and sanitizing requirements. — --Warewash machine was not maintained and/or operated as required. Dish machine was found dirty. This should be cleaned and maintained clean.

Cleaning and maintenance of floors, walls and ceilings. — --Physical facilities (e.g. floors, walls, ceiling etc…) were not clean or not cleaned as often as necessary to keep them clean. Floor found dirty throughout kitchen. This should be cleaned and maintained clean. Wall next to the meat department 2 compartment sink found dirty below knife storage. Wall should be cleaned and maintained clean.

Cleaning frequency of equipment and utensils. — --Nonfood contact surface was not cleaned as frequently as required. Doors for the cupboards below the beverage bar were found dirty. These should be cleaned and maintained clean.

Mechanical cleaning and sanitizing requirements. — --Dish machine drain board area was found dirty. This should be cleaned and maintained clean.--Soap was found empty for the dish machine. Soap should be provided for washing dishes. ***Corrected during inspection.

Plumbing system. — --Plumbing system was not designed, constructed, operated and/or maintained according to regulation. Hand sink was found with a bucket under drain pipe to catch leaks. Plumbing should be properly maintained.
Proper storage, no-reuse (1 pt deducted)
Design, construction, clean, maintained (1 pt deducted)
Handwashing, good hygienic practices (5 pts deducted)
Bare hand contact avoided, single- use gloves, and utensils used (3 pts deducted)
Cleaning frequency, maintained clean (2 pts deducted)
Cleaning frequency, maintained clean (1 pt deducted)
Properly designed, located, constructed, operated, maintained, cleaned and chemical test kit provided (2 pts deducted)
Design, construction, clean, maintained (1 pt deducted)
Clean, employee dressing area, cleaning equipment storage, living/sleeping quarters separate (1 pt deducted)
Hot holding and cold holding temperatures maintained, unwrapped food not reserved (5 pts deducted)
Cleaning frequency, maintained clean (2 pts deducted)
Cleaning frequency, maintained clean (1 pt deducted)
